title: Allahabad High Court grants anticipatory bail to Swami Avimukteshwaranand Saraswati in POCSO case
description: The Allahabad High Court on Wednesday granted anticipatory bail to Swami Avimukteshwaranand Saraswati, a popular religious figure in Uttar Pradesh, in a case registered against him under the Protection of Children from Sexual Offences (POCSO) Act.A Special POCSO Court had last month ordered the police to register a case against the religious figure to probe allegations of sexual abuse against him. It was alleged that Swami Avimukteshwaranand had sexually abused two minor boys at a camp.According
